children.heading: Selection; employment; compensation
children.label: a Selection; employment; compensation
children.text: The Administrator is authorized to select, employ, and fix the compensation of such officers and employees, including attorneys, as are necessary to perform the functions vested in the Administrator and to prescribe their functions.

children.heading: Special personnel
children.label: b Special personnel
children.text: The Administrator is authorized to select, appoint, and employ not to exceed three officers and to fix their compensation at rates not to exceed the rate now or hereafter payable under .section 5376 of title 5

children.heading: Personnel from other agencies
children.label: c Personnel from other agencies
children.text: Upon the request of the Administrator, the head of any Federal agency is authorized to detail, on a reimbursable basis, any of its personnel to the Administrator to assist the Administrator in carrying out the functions of the Administrator under this subchapter.

children.heading: Experts and consultants
children.label: d Experts and consultants
children.text: The Administrator may obtain services as authorized by , at rates not to exceed the rate now or hereafter payable under .section 3109 of title 5section 5376 of title 5
